summary: Chinese ground drones modeled as "wolf packs" have been demonstrated, featuring autonomous coordination, real-time data sharing, terrain mapping, UAV integration, and target engagement under single-operator control. The UAE has unveiled the SHADOW 25, a jet-powered strike UAV with a 450 km/h cruising speed, 25 kg warhead, and 250 km range. Russian forces have begun using the "Lis-2" interceptor drone and tested the "Prince Vladimir Svyatoslavovich" FPV drone, while the LazerBuzz laser system has been integrated with radar. On March 29, Ukrainian forces launched a large-scale drone attack, with Russian air defenses intercepting at least 203 UAVs, including strikes on the Ust-Luga port. Russian media reports progress on the "Рассвет" low-orbit satellite network, aiming to rival Starlink with 250 satellites by 2027 and 730 by 2030. Ukrainian forces used electronic warfare to force FPV drone landings, and Russian FPV teams destroyed a Ukrainian T-64 tank in Konstantinovka. A Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed near Nadiivka, with the crew eliminated during evacuation. Cluster and guided bomb strikes targeted Ukrainian UAV launch sites and airfields.
